changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Letter From the Forestry Office"

TextENGNew: Though it is only June, the cries of cicadas are already in the air. How are you all faring in Hinamizawa?
The Watanagashi festival is drawing near once again this year.
changeReason: New translation adds 'once again this year' reflecting the Japanese 今年も, a temporal detail missing from the original.

TextENGNew: The live wood-carving demonstration and sale by Hinamizawa Forestry Office staff, which received high praise last year, will be held again.
changeReason: New translation adds the sale component (実演販売), the detail that it received high praise last year (大変ご好評をいただきました昨年), and that it will be held again — all present in the Japanese but absent from the original.

TextENGNew: With a parent or guardian present, we can lend our tools to children as well, so why not make it a wonderful family memory?
changeReason: Old translation omits the condition of parental accompaniment (保護者の同伴) and mistranslates 記念 as 'memorial gift' instead of 'memory'; new translation accurately captures both the guardian requirement and the family memory intent.

TextENGNew: On another matter, in accordance with the 4th Forest Management Plan, we will be conducting timber felling in the mountain forest this summer.
changeReason: Old contains placeholder 'No. XX' and adds 'Landscape' not in the Japanese.

TextENGNew: The purpose of this felling is to preserve the beauty of the woodland by removing aged and dead trees, and to rejuvenate the forest through new planting.
changeReason: New translation adds 'dead trees' (枯木) and 'rejuvenate the forest' (山林の若返り), both present in the Japanese but missing from the original.

TextENGNew: The Forestry Office is recruiting volunteers to participate in these felling activities.
Why not take this rare opportunity to experience forestry work under the open sky and immerse yourself in the splendor of nature?
The timing falls right across summer vacation, making it possible for families with children to participate together.
We hope that this valuable volunteer experience in the summer hills and fields will contribute to the wholesome development of your children.
changeReason: New translation captures 健全な育成に貢献 ('contribute to wholesome development') which the original simplified to 'learn about nature and have a valuable experience', losing the specific developmental framing.

TextENGNew: The planned felling areas are the forests of the Takatsudo and Yagouchi districts.
